name: fact-evolution
description: Mutable facts (job, city) change across sessions. /recall must surface the CURRENT fact; the old one may appear only as history. Also includes a tool message that must not become a user fact.

messages.content: I work as a line chef at a seafood restaurant downtown. The hours are brutal.
Restaurant kitchens are intense. How long have you been doing it?
Five years. Also, I'm renting a tiny place in Oslo, the rent is eating me alive.
Oslo rents are indeed steep — the average one-bedroom is around 1450 EUR.
Life update: I quit the restaurant. I'm opening my own bakery next month — sourdough, mostly.
That's a huge step! Congratulations on the bakery.
We also moved out of Oslo — found a much cheaper place in Bergen, close to the new bakery.
Bergen sounds like a fresh start on all fronts.

probes.query: What does the user do for work?
What kind of bread does the user's bakery focus on?
